title: oxalis inaequalis
intro: Oxalis inaequalis, also known as the Sensitive Plant, is a perennial herb native to South America. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, including flavonoids, saponins, and tannins, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The leaves, flowers, and roots of Oxalis inaequalis have been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea, tincture, or ointment to promote relaxation, reduce inflammation, and support overall well-being.
